name: LendNation
description_short: San Antonio LendNation storefront at 1223 SW Military Dr offers payday and title loans with same-day funding.
description_long:
The LendNation storefront at 1223 SW Military Dr in San Antonio, TX is a standalone payday and title loan location serving the Military Drive corridor. This San Antonio branch is open Monday through Friday from 9AM to 6PM, and Saturday mornings from 9AM to 1PM, making it accessible for working residents who need quick access to emergency cash.

At this San Antonio location, you can apply for payday loans, title loans, and other short-term lending products. The team can walk you through the application process and answer questions about loan terms and rates specific to your situation. Call 210-932-2109 to speak with a loan specialist or stop by the storefront during business hours for in-person assistance.

If you need emergency cash in San Antonio and prefer working with a local lender, this Military Drive location is designed for quick processing and same-day funding. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and banking information to speed up your application. LendNation specializes in fast approval decisions for borrowers who don't qualify for traditional bank loans.
address: 1223 SW Military Dr, San Antonio, TX 78221

company_info.headquarters: 1223 SW Military Dr, San Antonio, TX 78221

pros: Instant pre-approval decisions delivered immediately after online application submission
Multiple funding options including instant debit card funding and same-day cash access
Flexible loan products ranging from short-term payday loans to 36-month installment plans
Title loans allow borrowers to keep driving their vehicle while borrowing against its equity
Extended business hours including Saturday morning availability (9 AM-1 PM)
200+ physical locations across 11 states plus online lending options
4.8/5 Google rating based on 161 reviews, indicating strong customer satisfaction
cons: No APR or fee information disclosed on website; payday and title loans typically carry 300%+ APRs
High-cost lending products designed for short-term emergencies, not sustainable debt solutions
Limited product information on website makes it difficult to compare terms before applying
Title loans require vehicle collateral, creating repossession risk if payments are missed
Multi-pay loans extend up to 36 months, potentially trapping borrowers in long-term high-cost debt cycles
best_for: Consumers with immediate cash needs ($100-$1,000) before next paycheck with no other funding options
Vehicle owners needing larger amounts who can sustain title loan payments and accept repossession risk
Borrowers who prefer in-person application and guidance over fully online lenders
Texas residents in San Antonio area seeking accessible extended-hours lending locations
diagnosis: LendNation is best for consumers facing genuine emergencies who need cash within hours and have no access to credit cards, personal loans, or family support. The critical caveat is that payday and title loans are expensive short-term solutions (typically 300%+ APR) that should only be used when the alternative is worse—late bill payments, overdraft fees, or eviction—and the borrower can repay within the loan term without refinancing.
services: Multi-pay payday loans with installment repayment up to 36 months
Title loans secured by vehicle equity
meta_description: LendNation at 1223 SW Military Dr, San Antonio, TX. Payday and title loans with same-day funding.
